module_info.docstring:
tool-time deep analytics engine.

Reads all events from ~/.claude/tool-time/events.jsonl and produces
a rich analysis.json with session classification, tool chains, trends,
time patterns, and source comparison. Runs on-demand (not on every
SessionEnd like summarize.py).

Design doc: docs/plans/2026-02-14-deep-analytics-engine-design.md

functions.name: is_call_event
functions.docstring: True for events that represent a tool invocation (not result).

functions.name: is_error_event
functions.docstring: True for events carrying error info (PostToolUse or ToolUse with error).

functions.name: normalize_tool_name
functions.docstring: Normalize tool name for cross-source comparison.

functions.name: extract_session_id
functions.docstring:
Extract session UUID from event ID (format: uuid-seq).

Handles UUIDs with internal hyphens (RFC 4122) and multi-digit
sequence numbers by matching the last -digits suffix.

functions.name: parse_timestamp
functions.docstring: Parse timestamp from either ISO string or numeric ms.

functions.name: load_all_events
functions.docstring:
Load events from events.jsonl with optional filters.

All timestamps are normalized to timezone-aware UTC datetime objects
stored as event["_ts"] for internal use.

functions.name: group_by_session
functions.docstring: Group events by session ID, sort each group by timestamp.

functions.name: classify_session
functions.docstring:
Classify a session by tool usage pattern.

Priority: planning > debugging > building > reviewing > exploring > other.
Guard: returns "other" for sessions with no call events.

functions.name: compute_session_metrics
functions.docstring: Compute aggregate session metrics: count, duration, tools/session, classification.

functions.name: compute_bigrams
functions.docstring:
Compute tool transition bigrams across all sessions.

Only counts transitions between call events (PreToolUse/ToolUse),
ignoring PostToolUse to avoid fake self-loops from Pre→Post pairs.

functions.name: compute_trigrams
functions.docstring: Compute tool transition trigrams (sliding window of 3) over call events.

functions.name: compute_retry_patterns
functions.docstring:
Detect same-tool-same-file retry after error.

Only for file-based tools (Read, Edit, Write) — other tools don't
have a file field, causing false positives.

functions.name: compute_weekly_trends
functions.docstring:
Group events by ISO week, return time series of metrics per week.

Uses (iso_year, iso_week) as key to handle year boundaries correctly.
Tool names are normalized for cross-source consistency.

functions.name: _get_local_tz
functions.docstring: Get system local timezone, fallback to UTC.

functions.name: compute_time_patterns
functions.docstring:
Compute hour-of-day and day-of-week patterns.

Uses local timezone by default so peak hours are meaningful.

functions.name: compute_source_comparison
functions.docstring: Per-source metrics with normalized tool names.

functions.name: compute_project_breakdown
functions.docstring: Per-project metrics with raw tool names.

functions.name: run_analysis
functions.docstring: Run full analysis and return the result dict.
